snippet.title: GOD STYLE  | YO YO HONEY SINGH | Hommie Dilliwala | Full Video
snippet.description:
Here's  #GodStyle by Yo Yo Honey Singh.
Song : GOD STYLE 
*SINGER : YO YO HONEY SINGH* 
Lyrics: Hommie dilliwala
Music producer: *YO YO HONEY SINGH*
Composer : *YO YO HONEY SINGH*
Mixed by : *YO YO HONEY SINGH*
Mastered by : Hommie Dilliwala
Directed by : Pitch Gray
Executive producer: Passant Shams Ell Dean
Digital Strategy : Rajdeep Mayer
Graphics /Posters : RDM Media
Digital marketing & Campaign : RDM Media and Bull18 

Production house- Tash Films Creations
Line Producer- Aadesh Gola
Unit production manager- Prashant Rohilla
Production Manager- Ashish Moudgil
Makeup (YYHS)- Pallavi Kapoor
Makeup (Feature artist)- Pallavi kapoor and team
Stylist (Yo Yo Honey Singh) - Akanksha Bhakoo
Stylist (Feature Artist)- Tanya Mehrotra
Production Design, Art Direction & Set Execution- Varun Kumar(@beardseyeview) and Rishabh Chadha
Casting - Anil Kumar (Ak Films)

Lyrics :- 

Aya Vijayta 
Khuda ka chaheta 
Yodha hai subhe wo 
Raat ko dracula 
Beat’ein hai sajata 
Rokda chabata 
Hater ko nachata 
Karwata bachata 

Kara ni diss abhi Fir bhi ye baithe hai sehem ke 
Duniya kehti yoyo thoda Toh rehem de 

Ikyavan gaane daale 
Jal ke kaale saale 
Chaabi faiki maine 
Muh pe maare taale 

Inke ney gaane lagte 
Jaise puraane 
Music sudharne 
bheja hai khuda ne 

RAP GOD Poori duniya nacha di 
RAP GOD Aesi kismat humarii
RAP GOD Macha di tabaahi 
Im handpicked by uparwala hi 

yaar mila de 
Pyaar mila de 
Zyada nee bus 
Ek baar mila de 
Rakhlunga bottal me 
Rooh me fasa ke 
Jhukti duniya 
Jo hum haat utha de 

yaar mila de 
Pyaar mila de 
Zyada nee bus 
Ek baar mila de 
Rakhlunga bottal me 
Rooh me fasa ke 
Jhukti duniya 
Jo hum haat utha de 

Matlabi Matlabi duniya 
Kaale naag ki karwat duniya 
Karti Chal kapat ye duniya 
Jalti har wakat ye duniya 

Zehereela sa sharbat duniya 
Beimaani si barkat duniya 
Be wajah ki harkat duniya 
I dont give a fuck to duniya 

Thaali khali jali bando ki kar daali 
Taali taali maare duniya saari taali 
Kali cadi kare noton ki rakhwali
Aisa dahaada ki duniya hee chaba li 

Bhaagte rapper hai haanfte 
Mootu taezaab inke carrier graph pe
Daily kankalo pe chadh ke naachte 
Nasha bharwane aate humse saanp ye 

LAVA HAI FLOW 
BACHO HATO 
DUNIYA ME 100
CHALAVE KYU 

Jaisa hu rehna du kyunki mai dheeth better 
Kabhi michael hu kabhi mai heath ledger 

RAP GOD Poori duniya nacha di 
RAP GOD Aesi kismat humare 
RAP GOD Macha di tabaahi 
Im handpicked by uparwala hi

yaar mila de 
Pyaar mila de 
Zyada nee bus 
Ek baar mila de 
Rakhlunga bottal me 
Rooh me fasa ke 
Jhukti duniya 
Jo hum haat utha de 

yaar mila de 
Pyaar mila de 
Zyada nee bus 
Ek baar mila de 
Rakhlunga bottal me 
Rooh me fasa ke 
Jhukti duniya 
Jo hum haat utha de

#yoyohoneysingh

snippet.description:
Paan mein paan chakhna ho toh meetha! Aur toofan ko nachte dekhna ho toh... EETHA! 🔥🔥

Teaser Out Now! In Cinemas 28th August 2026.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Cast: Shraddha Kapoor, Randeep Hooda

snippet.title: New Song 2026 | New Hindi Song | Best of Arijit Singh, Jubin Nautiyal,Atif Aslam ,Darshan Raval 💖
snippet.description:
#hindisong #hindilovesong #bollywoodsongs #hindisong2026 #newsong2026 
---------------------------------------------------------------------

➡️
➡️ https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL5j1-uKFiqNjGnWwvRhIOmrSPIGd5IMJ_

CUMBIAS VIEJITAS is a channel that curates the best Hindi love songs from top artists like Arijit Singh, Jubin Nautiyal, Atif Aslam, Neha Kakkar, Armaan Malik, and Shreya Ghoshal. We focus on compiling and mixing romantic Bollywood tracks, soulful ballads, and emotional melodies into nonstop playlists that are easy to listen to, relaxing, and full of feeling.

We share music to bring you peaceful, romantic vibes, helping you unwind and immerse yourself in beautiful love stories through every melody.

snippet.title: Alliance - Official Trailer | Kunal Kemmu | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Alliance Official Trailer 
Starring Kunal Kemmu
Directed by Tarun Panjwani 
Produced by Banijay Asia
Written by Swati Sahay
Created by John de Mol & Talpa Studios

Official Release Date - June 26, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Alliance is a competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare. Sixteen celebrities are split into four teams, battling through physical and mental challenges to earn points—the only currency inside a mysterious HQ run by the System. Face the Ace’s power, survive weekly votes, and rebuild alliances every reset. New Episodes Daily at 12pm!                      

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#alliance #trailer #officialtrailer #comedy #funny #drama #realityshow #webseries #AllianceOnPrime #primevideoindia

snippet.title: Tera Paisa Mera Paisa | Welcome To The Jungle | Akshay Kumar, Vikram Montrose, Farhad, Rubai, Meggha
snippet.description:
Tera paisa, mera paisa, iska paisa... PAISA PAISA PAISA!

Junglee Music presents 'Tera Paisa Mera Paisa' from the upcoming movie Welcome to the Jungle. This latest Bollywood song, sung by Akshay Kumar, Farhad Bhiwandiwala, Rubai and Vikram Montrose, turns the idea of paisa paisa into a high-energy musical celebration. With Akshay Kumar, Disha Patani, Suniel Shetty and Jacqueline Fernandez bringing the heat on screen, it is designed to make you smile, groove, and sing along. Watch and experience the latest musical madness from Welcome To The Jungle.

Advance Booking Open Now, book your tickets now: https://linktr.ee/WelcomeToTheJungleTickets

#WelcomeToTheJungle, paid previews begin 25th June, 7:30 PM onwards 🍿

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali

snippet.title: Baby Do Die Do - Official Trailer | Huma Qureshi, Rachit, Chunky P | Nachiket Samant | Saqib Saleem
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Trailer of Baby Do Die Do, an action-packed thriller starring Huma Qureshi, Sikander Kher, Chunky Pandey, Seema Pahwa, Rachit Singh, Vidya Malavade, Himanshu Malik, Marudhar Shekhawat and Arun Kushwah. Directed By Nachiket Samant & Produced By Saqib Saleem.

Get ready for a thrilling journey filled with mystery, suspense, action, and unexpected twists. Watch the trailer now and step into the world of Baby Do Die Do.

In Cinemas 3rd July 2026

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

snippet.title: Evergreen Romantic Bollywood Songs | ANDAAZ AAYEGA MAZA AB BARSAAT KA | Hindi Love Hits
snippet.description:
Experience beautiful romantic video status clips featuring intimate couple moments and scenic backdrops. Perfect for finding your next inspiration.

This video showcases a collection of romantic couple scenes set against serene water and indoor landscapes. If you enjoy aesthetic visuals paired with meaningful lyrics like Teri Meri Dilkash Mulagaat Ka, this compilation captures the essence of longing and passion. It is designed for anyone looking for high-quality romantic song editing references or simply wanting to enjoy heartfelt cinematic moments.

Each scene highlights the connection between the couple, focusing on emotional intimacy and visually striking environments. Whether you are searching for new love lyrics status ideas or appreciate the art of capturing emotional storytelling, these clips provide a comprehensive look at how to frame passionate couple moments effectively.

Subscribe for weekly romantic video status updates and comment below which type of couple aesthetic you want to see in our next feature.

snippet.title: The Rage of IRUMUDI ( Trailer ) | Ravi Teja | Priya Bhavani Shankar | Shiva nirvana | Gv  Prakash
snippet.description:
#Irumudi #IrumudiTrailer #RaviTeja #TeluguMovieTrailer#irumudikattu #IRUMUDI

 The much-awaited Irumudi Trailer unveils a powerful blend of devotion, emotion, action, and cinematic grandeur. At MOVIETAINMENT, we celebrate stories that leave an impact—and this trailer delivers an intriguing glimpse into a spiritually rooted journey packed with intense moments and visual brilliance.

The incredible response from audiences reflects the growing excitement surrounding this project, and we’re thrilled to witness this cinematic experience unfold. A heartfelt salute to visionary director Shiva Nirvana, whose storytelling promises depth, devotion, and emotional intensity. Special appreciation to GV Prakash Kumar for elevating the trailer with an immersive and impactful background score.

Leading the journey with commanding screen presence, Ravi Teja appears in a refreshing and emotionally charged role, bringing energy and devotion to the narrative. Priya Bhavani Shankar adds grace and depth, enhancing the film’s emotional core. Every frame hints at a powerful cinematic experience designed to connect with audiences.

Wishing the entire Irumudi team tremendous success—this journey looks set to inspire and entertain! 🎥🙏

Count MOVIETAINMENT as your destination for the latest songs, trailers, and everything cinema!


Experience the powerful world of Irumudi through its official trailer! 🔥🎬
Starring Ravi Teja and Priya Bhavani Shankar, this trailer presents a compelling mix of devotion, emotion, and cinematic spectacle. Backed by GV Prakash Kumar’s impactful score and visually rich storytelling, Irumudi promises an unforgettable big-screen experience.

snippet.title: Spider-Man Brand New Day’s Hidden Villain Finally Decoded!
snippet.description:
Marvel has done it before, and they may be doing it AGAIN with Spider-Man: Brand New Day. From Avengers: Infinity War hiding Hulk, to Spider-Man: No Way Home hiding Tobey Maguire and Andrew Garfield, Marvel has mastered misdirection.

But this time, the mystery around Sadie Sink may be hiding the REAL mastermind. Is she protecting Punisher? Is the psychic chaos connected to Jean Grey? Or is the true villain none other than Jackal?

In this video, we break down every hidden clue from the Brand New Day trailer and explain why Miles Warren might be the biggest threat to Peter Parker yet.

snippet.title: Nagabandham Official Trailer | Virat Karrna | Nabha Natesh | Abhishek Nama | Abhishek Pictures
snippet.description:
Nagabandham Official Trailer on @AbhishekPicturesOfficial and @nikstudiosindia   

Nagabandham is an 2026 Upcoming Pan India Movie Starring Virat Karrna, Nabha Natesh, Ishwarya Menon, Mahesh Manjrekar, Jagapathi Babu & others. Story, Screenplay & Direction by Abhishek Nama. Presented by Lakshmi Ira & Devansh Nama and Produced by Kishore Annapureddy, Nishitha Nagireddy under NIK Studios & Abhishek Pictures.

In Cinemas Worldwide from 3rd July, 2026.

This stream is all about speed, style, and chilling with the community. Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and share the stream to support the channel and be part of the GTA V family.#gta6

snippet.title: TOXIC Official Trailer (2026) | Yash | A New Era of Violence
snippet.description:
TOXIC Official Trailer (2026) | Yash | A New Era of Violence

Presenting the intense fan-made trailer of TOXIC, starring Yash in a powerful action-packed avatar.
This trailer is created for entertainment purposes with cinematic visuals, powerful BGM, and mass action vibes.

Get ready for high-octane action, dark storytelling, and Yash’s powerful screen presence in this epic upcoming movie.

🔥 Action
🔥 Mass Entry
🔥 Powerful Dialogues
🔥 Cinematic Experience

#Toxic #Yash #OfficialTrailer #ToxicTrailer #YashNewMovie #ActionMovie #FanMadeTrailer

fr-FR.title: TOXIC Bande-annonce officielle (2026) | Yash | Une nouvelle ère de violence
fr-FR.description:
Bande-annonce officielle de TOXIC (2026) | Yash | Une nouvelle ère de violence

Découvrez la bande-annonce percutante réalisée par un fan pour TOXIC, avec Yash dans un rôle puissant et explosif.

Cette bande-annonce, conçue à des fins de divertissement, offre des visuels cinématographiques, une musique de fond entraînante et une ambiance explosive.

Préparez-vous à une action intense, un scénario sombre et la présence magnétique de Yash à l'écran dans ce film épique très attendu.

🔥 Action
🔥 Entrée en scène spectaculaire
🔥 Dialogues percutants
🔥 Expérience cinématographique

Regardez jusqu'au bout et partagez vos impressions dans les commentaires.

#Toxic #Yash #BandeAnnonceOfficielle #BandeAnnonceToxic #NouveauFilmYash #FilmAction #BandeAnnonceFan

Cette vidéo est une bande-annonce conceptuelle réalisée par un fan à des fins de divertissement uniquement. Il ne s'agit pas d'une bande-annonce officielle. Tous les éléments visuels et audio appartiennent à leurs propriétaires respectifs.

it.title: TOXIC Trailer Ufficiale (2026) | Yash | Una nuova era di violenza
it.description:
Trailer Ufficiale di TOXIC (2026) | Yash | Una Nuova Era di Violenza

Vi presentiamo l'intenso trailer amatoriale di TOXIC, con Yash in una versione potente e ricca di azione.

Questo trailer è stato creato a scopo di intrattenimento, con immagini cinematografiche, una colonna sonora coinvolgente e un'atmosfera da film d'azione di massa.

Preparatevi a un'azione adrenalinica, una trama oscura e la potente presenza scenica di Yash in questo epico film in arrivo.

🔥 Azione
🔥 Entrata di massa
🔥 Dialoghi incisivi
🔥 Esperienza cinematografica

Guardate fino alla fine e condividete le vostre impressioni nei commenti.

#Toxic #Yash #TrailerUfficiale #TrailerToxic #NuovoFilmYash #FilmAzione #TrailerAmatoDaiFan

Disclaimer:
Questo video è un trailer amatoriale creato a solo scopo di intrattenimento. Non è un trailer ufficiale. Tutti i contenuti visivi e audio appartengono ai rispettivi proprietari.

hi.title: TOXIC आधिकारिक ट्रेलर (2026) | यश | हिंसा का एक नया युग
hi.description:
टॉक्सिक का आधिकारिक ट्रेलर (2026) | यश | हिंसा का एक नया युग

यश अभिनीत और एक्शन से भरपूर फिल्म टॉक्सिक का ज़बरदस्त फैन-मेड ट्रेलर प्रस्तुत है।

यह ट्रेलर मनोरंजन के उद्देश्य से बनाया गया है, जिसमें सिनेमाई दृश्य, दमदार बैकग्राउंड म्यूजिक और एक्शन का भरपूर तड़का है।

इस शानदार आगामी फिल्म में हाई-ऑक्टेन एक्शन, डार्क स्टोरीटेलिंग और यश की दमदार स्क्रीन प्रेजेंस के लिए तैयार हो जाइए।

🔥 एक्शन
🔥 ज़बरदस्त एंट्री
🔥 दमदार डायलॉग
🔥 सिनेमाई अनुभव

वीडियो अंत तक देखें और कमेंट्स में अपने विचार साझा करें।

#Toxic #Yash #OfficialTrailer #ToxicTrailer #YashNewMovie #ActionMovie #FanMadeTrailer

अस्वीकरण:
यह वीडियो केवल मनोरंजन के उद्देश्य से बनाया गया एक फैन-मेड कॉन्सेप्ट ट्रेलर है। यह आधिकारिक ट्रेलर नहीं है। सभी दृश्य और ऑडियो उनके संबंधित स्वामियों के हैं।

pt-BR.title: TOXIC Trailer Oficial (2026) | Yash | Uma Nova Era de Violência
pt-BR.description:
Trailer Oficial de TOXIC (2026) | Yash | Uma Nova Era de Violência

Apresentamos o intenso trailer feito por fãs de TOXIC, estrelado por Yash em uma poderosa atuação repleta de ação.

Este trailer foi criado para fins de entretenimento, com visuais cinematográficos, trilha sonora impactante e muita ação.

Prepare-se para ação de alta octanagem, narrativa sombria e a poderosa presença de Yash nas telas neste épico filme que está por vir.

🔥 Ação
🔥 Entrada Impactante
🔥 Diálogos Marcantes
🔥 Experiência Cinematográfica

Assista até o final e compartilhe sua opinião nos comentários.

#Toxic #Yash #TrailerOficial #TrailerToxic #NovoFilmeYash #FilmeDeAção #TrailerFeitoPorFãs

id.title: Trailer Resmi TOXIC (2026) | Yash | Era Baru Kekerasan
id.description:
Trailer Resmi TOXIC (2026) | Yash | Era Baru Kekerasan

Mempersembahkan trailer buatan penggemar yang intens dari TOXIC, dibintangi Yash dalam penampilan penuh aksi yang dahsyat.

Trailer ini dibuat untuk tujuan hiburan dengan visual sinematik, musik latar yang kuat, dan nuansa aksi massal.

Bersiaplah untuk aksi berkecepatan tinggi, penceritaan yang gelap, dan kehadiran Yash yang kuat di layar dalam film epik yang akan datang ini.

🔥 Aksi
🔥 Pembukaan Massal
🔥 Dialog yang Kuat
🔥 Pengalaman Sinematik

Tonton sampai akhir dan bagikan pendapat Anda di kolom komentar.

#Toxic #Yash #TrailerResmi #TrailerToxic #FilmBaruYash #FilmAksi #TrailerBuatanPenggemar

Video ini adalah trailer konsep buatan penggemar yang dibuat hanya untuk tujuan hiburan. Ini bukan trailer resmi. Semua visual dan audio milik pemiliknya masing-masing.

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney

Trailer Mixed & Mastered by: Abhishek Khandelwal (YRF Studios), Dileep Nair (Assistant Engineer - YRF Studios)
Trailer Background Music: Jamaican (Bam Bam)
Artist: HUGEL & SOLTO (FR)
Master: MoBlack Records
Publishers: Westbury Music Ltd., Prophesy Music Publishing and Abood Music Ltd.
Music Recreated by: Rohansh & Abeer

Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

#yrfspyuniverse #yrfnewreleases #yrf #alpha #yashraj #yashrajfilms #yrfmovies #yrfmusic #yashchopra #adityachopra #akshayewidhani #aliabhatt #sharvari #anilkapoor #bobbydeol #shivrawail 

© Yash Raj Films Pvt. Ltd.

৯ম বার্ষিকী ইভেন্ট কিভাবে সম্পূর্ণ করবেন 🥳| ফ্রি ইমোট কিভাবে পাবেন | ফ্রি ফায়ার নতুন ইভেন্ট

ফ্রি ফায়ারের নতুন ৯ম বার্ষিকী ইভেন্ট | ফ্রি ইমোট কিভাবে নেবেন | এফএফ নতুন ইভেন্ট | ফ্রি ফায়ার নতুন ইভেন্ট

ফ্রি ফায়ারের নতুন ৯ম বার্ষিকী ইভেন্ট | কিভাবে ফ্রি ইমোট পাবেন | আজকের এফএফ নতুন ইভেন্ট

ফ্রি ফায়ারের ৯ম বার্ষিকী ইভেন্ট কিভাবে সম্পূর্ণ করবেন | এফএফ-এর নতুন রিং ইভেন্ট | ফ্রি ফায়ার নতুন ইভেন্ট

নতুন ৯ম বার্ষিকী ইভেন্টে মোট কত ডায়মন্ড লাগবে

নতুন রিং ইভেন্টে মোট কত ডায়মন্ড লাগবে | এফএফ নতুন ইভেন্ট | ফ্রি ফায়ার নতুন ইভেন্ট

এফএফ নতুন ইভেন্ট লাইট রয়্যাল ইভেন্ট ফ্রি ফায়ার আজকের নতুন ইভেন্ট ফ্রি ফায়ার নতুন আপডেট ফ্রি ফায়ারের নতুন ছবি ফ্রি ফায়ারের ছবি ফ্রি ফায়ারের নতুন ছবি এফএফ নতুন ছবি নতুন ছবি এফএফ-এর নতুন ছবি আজকের নতুন ইভেন্ট আজ ফ্রি ফায়ারে কী পাওয়া যাবে ফ্রি ফায়ারের ছবি ফ্রি ফায়ারের নতুন ছবি আজ ফ্রি ফায়ারে কী এসেছে ফ্রি ফায়ারের নতুন ইভেন্টের বিবরণ এফএফ-এর নতুন ইভেন্টের বিবরণ ফ্রি ফায়ারের নতুন ইভেন্ট নতুন ইভেন্ট কীভাবে পূরণ করবেন ফ্রি ফায়ারের নতুন ইভেন্ট কীভাবে সম্পূর্ণ করবেন নতুন ইভেন্ট ফ্রি ফায়ারে কত ডায়মন্ড লাগবে ফ্রি ফায়ারের ভিডিও আজকের ফ্রি ফায়ারের ভিডিও নতুন টপিক ইভেন্ট আজকের খবর ইভেন্ট ফ্রি ফায়ারের নতুন ইভেন্ট কীভাবে পূরণ করবেন ভিডিও এফএফ-এর নতুন পুরস্কার এফএফ-এর আজকের নতুন পুরস্কার এফএফ-এর পুরস্কার কীভাবে নেবেন ফ্রি

snippet.title: मैं तो जाउंगी ससुराल | सबसे धमाकेदार डांस | Main To Janugi Sasural | Shiavni New Vivah Geet 2026
snippet.description:
मैं तो जाउंगी ससुराल | सबसे धमाकेदार डांस | Main To Janugi Sasural | Shiavni New Vivah Geet 2026
मैं तो जाउंगी ससुराल | सबसे धमाकेदार डांस | Main To Janugi Sasural | Shiavni New Vivah Geet 2026
मैं तो जाउंगी ससुराल | सबसे धमाकेदार डांस | Main To Janugi Sasural | Shiavni New Vivah Geet 2026

नमस्ते दोस्तों! Rathore Cassettes पर आप सभी का स्वागत है।

आज के इस वीडियो में देखिए शिवानी का अब तक का सबसे धमाकेदार और ऊर्जा से भरपूर डांस! इस नए विवाह गीत "मैं तो जाउंगी ससुराल" पर शिवानी ने अपनी बेहतरीन प्रस्तुति से सबका दिल जीत लिया है। साल 2026 का यह सबसे लेटेस्ट और सुपरहिट विवाह गीत (Vivah Geet) खास आपके लिए है।

अगर आपको यह डांस और गाना पसंद आए, तो वीडियो को Like करें, Share करें और हमारे चैनल को Subscribe करना न भूलें ताकि आप शिवानी के आने वाले सभी नए वीडियो देख सकें।

वीडियो में क्या खास है:

शिवानी का धमाकेदार डांस स्टेप्स।
नए ज़माने का नया विवाह गीत।
बेहतरीन म्यूजिक और लिरिक्स।

🔹 Song: Main To Jaungi Sasural
🔹 Singer: Shivani
🔹 Writer: Lokesh Prajapati
🔹 Music: Sonotek G.R.P Bros Surya Panchal
🔹Edit By: Sonotek Raushan King
🔹Design By: Sonotek Payal Bhatiya
🔹 Category: Shaid Vivah Geet
🔹 Label: Rathore Cassettes

नमस्ते दोस्तों! Rathore Cassettes पर आप सभी का स्वागत है।

बेहतरीन म्यूजिक और लिरिक्स।

snippet.title: Kis Baat Ki Narazgi – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Kis Baat Ki Narazgi – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Kis baat ki narazgi hai...
kyun tu mujhse itna khafa hai?

Maine to har mod par
tera saath nibhaya tha...
muflisi ho ya gardish,
har haal me wafa ki thi.

Phir bhi aaj
hamare darmiyan itni dooriyan kyun hain?

“Kis Baat Ki Narazgi”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo apni mohabbat ko
aaj bhi samajh nahi paaya.

Har raat dil
bas ek hi sawaal karta hai...

kis baat ki narazgi hai...
aakhir meri khata kya hai?

Mohabbat me kabhi kabhi
sawaal bahut hote hain...
magar jawaab kahin nahi milte.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
dard bhi hai,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo har toote dil ko chhoo jaata hai.

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se zyada chaha ho
aur aaj tak uski narazgi ki wajah na samajh paaye ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

localized.title: Kis Baat Ki Narazgi – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
localized.description:
Kis Baat Ki Narazgi – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Kis baat ki narazgi hai...
kyun tu mujhse itna khafa hai?

Maine to har mod par
tera saath nibhaya tha...
muflisi ho ya gardish,
har haal me wafa ki thi.

Phir bhi aaj
hamare darmiyan itni dooriyan kyun hain?

“Kis Baat Ki Narazgi”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo apni mohabbat ko
aaj bhi samajh nahi paaya.

Har raat dil
bas ek hi sawaal karta hai...

kis baat ki narazgi hai...
aakhir meri khata kya hai?

Mohabbat me kabhi kabhi
sawaal bahut hote hain...
magar jawaab kahin nahi milte.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
dard bhi hai,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo har toote dil ko chhoo jaata hai.

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se zyada chaha ho
aur aaj tak uski narazgi ki wajah na samajh paaye ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

Fall in love with the timeless melody "Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai" from the blockbuster movie. Beautifully sung by Udit Narayan and Alka Yagnik, this romantic duet captures the joy of expressing love and emotions from the heart.

Featuring Akshay Kumar and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most loved romantic tracks from the golden era of Bollywood music.

Movie: Andaaz (2003)

hi.title: Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai | Udit Narayan | Alka Yagnik | Andaaz (2003)
hi.description:
Fall in love with the timeless melody "Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai" from the blockbuster movie. Beautifully sung by Udit Narayan and Alka Yagnik, this romantic duet captures the joy of expressing love and emotions from the heart.

Featuring Akshay Kumar and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most loved romantic tracks from the golden era of Bollywood music.

Movie: Andaaz (2003)
Song: Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai

आभार : समाजवादी पार्टी ,समस्त मित्र गण व सम्मानित जनता 

चेतावनी : कृपया कोई भी गायक या यूटूबर हमारे ऑडियो या वीडियो का किसी भी प्रकार से कॉपीराइट नियम का उलंघन करके दुरुपयोग न करें, अन्यथा कॉपीराइट क्लेम के तहत उचित कार्यवाही की जाएगी।

निवेदन : मैं गायक धर्मेन्द्र सोलंकी आप सब से हाथ जोड़ कर निवेदन करता हूँ कि हमारे गीत को अधिक से अधिक शेयर करें व Solanki Samajwadi चैनल को सब्सक्राइब कर समाजवादी आवाज़ को बुलंद रखने में मेरा सहयोग करें।

जय समाजवाद । जय अखिलेश । जय मुलायम

हमारे  कुछ अन्य समाजवादी गानों के लिंक इस प्रकार हैं -

छप्पन इंच का सीना है , झूठ बोल कर जीना है https://youtu.be/kY47A-7apW4

बच के रहिह भईया , झुट्ठन के सरकार आइल बा https://youtu.be/XW9rZZukQFY

चौरी- चौरा गोरखपुर के श्यामनारायण यादव की शहादत (बिरहा) https://youtu.be/aPV1ZZv0o4E

साइकिल जाई राजधानी में https://youtu.be/b0gODkbxxGI

मेहरारू जेकर नइखे ऊ बात करेला तलाक़ क https://youtu.be/u4MUeDw-Q5c

हे बजरंगी दुख के संगी https://youtu.be/akgdgzBORZg

कुर्सी जनता के दिहल ह , तोहरे बाप के नाही https://youtu.be/OylC-VZY_Js

झंडा फहरेगा अखिलेश जी का https://youtu.be/ZrryXCt70u4

भाजपा से नीमन रहे साइकिल वाला https://youtu.be/ewp_CAhXq0M

लाल किले पर साइकिल निशान ,मांग रहा है हिंदुस्तान https://youtu.be/XBkXYYu_Ry4

मिल गईल साइकिल अउरी हाथी , फाटे भाजपा के छाती https://youtu.be/wezRJRf7Xmo

दूध रोटी खाएंगे ,गठबंधन को जिताएंगे https://youtu.be/DbvinnDxq2U

जा जा रे मोदी तूने जनता को रुला दिया https://youtu.be/V0IpSRdJLRI

याद रहे 22 मे फिर अखिलेश को वापस लाएंगे https://youtu.be/aWfontPrx_o

संघर्षो के आदी हैं ,हम तो समाजवादी हैं https://youtu.be/j7PO3qoVUk4

लोगवा जोहेला अखिलेश वाली सरकार ए साहेब https://youtu.be/Igtr4gzyb3I

सबके लायक रहले भालचंद जी नेता https://youtu.be/sSdW8sfuf6M

अखिलेश का शासन  आएगा https://youtu.be/olH46Q22i1E

कुर्सी जाएगी अखिलेश जी के हाथ में https://youtu.be/xZMX2zONWvw

मुलायम सिंह यादव जी के जन्मदिन पर विशेष प्रस्तुति https://youtu.be/3JE1c9qCShM

निकलो घर मकानों से जंग लड़ो बेईमानों से https://youtu.be/W-MqLCw7E10

मोदी जी के राज मे पियाज 100 के पार भईल https://youtu.be/u26HNFBFFZI

हिटलर के हिटलरशाही का फरमान न मानेंगे https://youtu.be/g662F6c6KXg

यूपी अखिलेश बिन सोहात नइखे https://youtu.be/RG71lFof7sY

असली होली खेलब जब अखिलेश जी अईहे 22 में https://youtu.be/JMEATnZY3U0

दहसत से इलाका हिला देते हो
देह आग तोहार बाघ लेखा चलवा बा
लड़का:- कान्ह प गमछा, माथ प टिका
हाथे रायफलवा बा
जिला जवार में रे पगली तोरा यरवे के जलवा बा


लड़की:- ब्लैक रंग कुरता आ गाड़ी
गजब तोहार लागेला दाढ़ी
त करे ल मर्डर करेजा, तू त दिने में लेके सुपारी
लड़का:- जहाँ गोली के होई आवाज पगली
उहा बुझ लिहे बाटे रंगबाज पगली

हाथे रायफलवा बा
जिला जवार में रे पगली तोरा यरवे के जलवा बा


लड़की:- पुलिस प्रशासन ना बोले
ह नोकर गेट गाड़ी के खोले
शहर के गुंडा लो सारा, की पूरा तोहरा इशारा प डोले
लड़का:- कि दरोगा आपन इयारी बा हो
तबे कल्लू आशु के रंगदारी बा हो
लड़की:- तोहार नमवे के सगरो त हल्लावा बा
लड़का:- कान्ह प गमछा, माथ प टिका
हाथे रायफलवा बा
जिला जवार में रे पगली तोरा यरवे के जलवा बा

snippet.description:

► Song Credits 

Song: Diwana Mujhko Log Kahen
Artist: Mukesh
Music Director: Shankar-Jaikishan
Lyricist: Hasrat Jaipuri

► SONG LYRICS

deewana mujhko log kahen
main samjhun jag hai deewana
main samjhun jag hai deewana
deewana mujhko log kahen
main samjhun jag hai deewana
main samjhun jag hai deewana
deewana mujhko log kahen

hansta hai koi surat pe meri
hansta hai koi sirat pe meri
chhota hi sahi par dil hai bada
maein jhoomta paimana
deewana mujhko log

maein insaan seedha saadha hoon
imaan ka maein shehzaada hoon
hai kaun bura malik jane
maein pyar ka parwana
deewana mujhko log

maein pyar ki khatir mit jaaun
aur pyar ki khatir lut jaaun
chalta hi rahoon rah-e-manzil
anjaam khuda jaane
deewana mujhko log

Welcome to our channel dedicated to the timeless music of the 50s, 60s, 70s, 80s, and 90s.
Enjoy daily collections of evergreen songs including romantic, sad, dance, classical, and iconic hits.
If you love golden-era music, this is the perfect place for you.

हमारे चैनल में आपका स्वागत है, जो 50s, 60s, 70s, 80s और 90s के सदाबहार संगीत को समर्पित है।
यहाँ आपको रोज़ाना रोमांटिक, सैड, डांस, क्लासिकल और कई आइकॉनिक एवरग्रीन गानों का शानदार संग्रह सुनने को मिलेगा।
अगर आपको गोल्डन एरा के गाने पसंद हैं, तो यह चैनल आपके लिए बिल्कुल परफेक्ट जगह है।

snippet.title: Nagan Si Lugai Tera Balam Chota (Official Video) Farmani Naaz | New haryanvi Song | Hema| Naaz Music
snippet.description:
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla
Lyrics  - varunesh baisla , Anuj Mulheda 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)
Singer - Farmani Naaz , Manish Tyagi 
Video Shoot - Panchal Productions
Director -  Rahul Mulheda , Nitin Panchal 
Editor - Nitin Panchal 
Publicity Design - Rahul mulheda
Publisher - Naaz Music
Label -   Naaz Music
Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri


म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा
र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा 

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

लाख लाख के सूट मै पहरू सवा लाख की जूती रे
चांदी का मेरा वायरल नाड़ा दिल्ली के मै कोठी र

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

This Haryanvi Song Sung by rahul mulheda. Music given manish tyagi. Penned by Ravi Rangi. Copyright & Music label by NAAZ MUSIC

snippet.title: Franklin Purchase New Modified Heavy Police Dumper Aero 🤑 Indian Theft Auto Simulator | New update💥🤩
snippet.description:
🎮 Experience the thrill of urban life in **Indian Thift Auto Simulator Gameplay**! 🚗✨ Dive into adrenaline-pumping streets where you can unleash your wild side with an exciting mix of cars and bikes. Join us as we explore the newer features, unique vehicles, and dynamic missions that make this game a must-play for every gamer. From racing through bustling markets to mastering daring heists, follow along as we drive, customize, and conquer all challenges! Don't forget to hit the subscribe button for more incredible gameplay adventures. 🔔 #IndianThiftAuto #Gameplay #Cars #Bikes #GamingVibes
🌟 Get ready for an adrenaline-fueled ride in our newest video featuring Indian Thift Auto Simulator Gameplay! 🚗💨 Dive into the vibrant streets as we explore incredible cars and bikes in a totally immersive environment. Watch as we take on thrilling challenges, showcase stunning visuals, and uncover hidden treasures throughout the city. From gripping action sequences to hilarious moments, this gameplay promises fun for every viewer. Don't forget to hit that LIKE button and SUBSCRIBE for more epic content! 🛵✨ Comment below and share your thoughts or tips, and let’s cruise into adventure together! #IndianThiftAutoSimulator #GamingJoy
Get ready to dive into the chaotic world of "Indian Thift Auto Simulator"! In this electrifying new gameplay, we showcase the heart-pounding moments of crafting epic car and bike adventures in a uniquely vibrant Indian setting. Watch as we navigate through crowded streets and experience the thrill of unexpected twists! 😎 Whether you're a seasoned pro or a newcomer, our gameplay offers valuable tips and jaw-dropping maneuvers that will keep you entertained. Buckle up and prepare for high-speed action, hilarious encounters, and ultimate thrills! Don’t forget to like, comment, and subscribe for more Indian Thift Auto Simulator gameplay! 🚗💨
🚗💨 Get ready to rev up the excitement with our latest Indian Thift Auto Simulator gameplay video! Dive into an immersive world where chaos and adventure collide. Watch as we navigatethrough the vibrant streets filled with thrilling car and bike action. Experience jaw-dropping stunts, wild chases, and breathtaking graphics that bring the essence of India to life! Whether you’re a booster of open-world games or just curious about what India has to offer in the gaming world, this video is a must-watch. Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and hit that bell icon for more epic gameplay updates! 🎮🔥 #IndianThiftAuto #Gameplay

snippet.description:
#KandaangiKandaangi #Jilla #ThalapathyVijay #Vijay #KajalAggarwal #DImman #ShreyaGhoshal #Vairamuthu #StarMusic 
Watch the evergreen romantic hit “Kandaangi Kandaangi” from the blockbuster movie Jilla, featuring Thalapathy Vijay and Kajal Aggarwal. Composed by D. Imman, this soulful Tamil melody beautifully captures the warmth, love, and emotions of a heartfelt relationship.

Song Details:
Movie - Jilla
Song - Kandaangi Kandaangi 
Music - D.Imman
Singer - Vijay, Shreya Ghoshal
Lyricist - Vairamuthu

snippet.title: శ్రీ వినాయక సహస్రనామం వింటే మీ ఆరోగ్య సమస్యలు దూరం అవుతాయి🙏 | Vinayaka Sahasranamam  Full Telugu
snippet.description:
శ్రీ వినాయక సహస్రనామం వింటే మీ ఆరోగ్య సమస్యలు దూరం అవుతాయి🙏 | Vinayaka Sahasranamam  Full Telugu 


Listen to the sacred Sri Vinayaka Sahasranamam (1000 names of Lord Ganesha) and experience divine peace, positivity, and healing energy. Chanting or listening to Vinayaka Sahasranamam with true devotion is believed to remove obstacles, reduce health problems, and bring overall well-being, success, and happiness.

Lord Ganesha (Vinayaka) is known as the remover of all difficulties and the giver of wisdom and prosperity. This full Telugu version of Vinayaka Sahasranamam is perfect for daily prayer, meditation, and spiritual growth.


#VinayakaSahasranamam #GaneshSahasranamam #VinayakaSongs #GaneshMantra #BhaktiSongs 


Ganapathi Sahasranamam, Vinayaka Songs, Ganesha Stotram, Lord Ganesha Songs, Telugu Devotional Songs, Bhakti Songs Telugu, Ganapathi Songs, Ganesh Songs Telugu, Vinayaka Songs Telugu, Vinayaka Stotram, Ganapathi Patalu, God Songs, Bhakti Songs, Telugu Bhakti Songs, God Songs Telugu, Bhakti Patalu, Vinayaka Bhakti Patalu, Vinayaka Devotional Songs, Ganapathi Mantram, Wednesday Special Songs, Vinayaka Bhakti Songs

snippet.title: हनुमान जी के भजन | Hanuman Bhajan l Balaji Bhajan 2026| Hanuman Ji ke Bhajan | Bhajan
snippet.description:
मंगलवार स्पेशल।हनुमान जी के भजन | Hanuman Bhajan l Balaji Bhajan 2026| Hanuman Ji ke Bhajan | Bhajan

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏


⭐Song : 
 श्री राम की गली में तुम जाना
घुंघरू बाजे रे बजरंग नाचे रे
लहर-लहर लहराए रे झंडा 
छम छम नाचे देखो वीर हनुमाना
श्री हनुमान चालीसा
जय जय जय हनुमान गुसाईं
संकट मोचन हनुमान अष्टक
आना पवन कुमार हमारे हरि कीर्तन
ये चमक ये दमक सब कुछ सरकार 
श्री हनुमान जी की आरती

⭐Singer :Upasana Mehta
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)

hi.description:

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏


⭐Song : 
 श्री राम की गली में तुम जाना
घुंघरू बाजे रे बजरंग नाचे रे
लहर-लहर लहराए रे झंडा 
छम छम नाचे देखो वीर हनुमाना
श्री हनुमान चालीसा
जय जय जय हनुमान गुसाईं
संकट मोचन हनुमान अष्टक
आना पवन कुमार हमारे हरि कीर्तन
ये चमक ये दमक सब कुछ सरकार 
श्री हनुमान जी की आरती

snippet.title: Unstable SMP: Purgatory
snippet.description:
Purgatory is the largest prison in all of Minecraft. Over 1,000 players on the Unstable SMP have been trapped inside, but today, I plan to face off against Jamato and free every last player.


This is the revolution. The Purgatory Finale




Unstable SMP Members
➜ @wemmbumc
➜ @FlameFragsMC
​⁠ ➜ @ParrotX2
​⁠ ➜ @Spokeishere






possible spoilers below this point

Features: @jumperwho @MapiccMc @jamatopecan


Music in this video:
Christopher Larkin
@ivoryfrill  &  @MythrodakTV  
DM DOKURO /  @DMDOKURO  
Pascal Stiefel /  @Plasma3Music  
Lena Raine / @LenaRaine 
C418 / @C418
Welcome to Mafia Town by Pascal Michael: A Hat in Time https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w1-lGNJADnw 
Tick Tock by Pascal Michael: A Hat in Time https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=As5j57PGviQ 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to tell the best stories possible. btw a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

spoke

snippet.title: Dil Ko Tere Naam Karke Mar Gaya

snippet.title: Bandhu 2.0 | Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika| Pritam | Kavita | Neeraj | Irshad K | Cocktail 2 | 19th June
snippet.description:
Tumhi din chadhe, tumhi din dhale,
Tumhi ho bandhu, sakha tumhi! 💃

Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna are back with ‘Bandhu 2.0’ from ‘Cocktail 2’! Composed by Pritam, penned by Irshad Kamil and sung by Kavita Seth and Neeraj Shridhar, get ready to get back in time and groove with it!

#Bandhu2.0 #Cocktail2 #ShahidKapoor #KritiSanon #RashmikaMandanna 

🎧 Song Credits 
Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon & Rashmika Mandanna 
Directed by : Amar Kaushik
Singer: Kavita Sheth and Neeraj Shridhar
Music Composer: Pritam Chakraborty 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil
Mixed and Mastered by - Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant to Eric Pillai - Michael Edwin Pillai

#Cocktail2, releasing in cinemas on 19th June 2026

🎬 Video Credits
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
Directed By: Homi Adajania 
Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan and Ankur Garg 
Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja
Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
Director of Choreography: Jaani Master
Publicity Design: Himanshu & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

Lyrics:
Yaara tere sadke
Ishq sikha main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Main toh yaara tere sadke
Main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Jab yaar kare parwah meri
Mujhe kya parwah iss duniya ki
Jag mujhpe lagaaye pabandhi
Main hoon hi nahi iss duniya ki
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Everytime every minute of the day
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Dil ki takhti par hoon likhti
Ishqan ishqan
Jag kya jaane dil ko mere
Ishqan kiska
Dil ki takhti par hoon likhti
Ishqan ishqan
Jag kya jaane dil ko mere
Ishqan kiska
Rabb yaar gale le saar meri
Mujhe kya parwah iss duniya ki
Tu jeet meri jag haar meri
Main hoon hi nahi iss duniya ki
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Nahi Hosh Tu Mujhe Thaamle
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi

snippet.title: Chandrachi Kor | चंद्राची कोर | Nick Shinde Srushti Ambavale | Sonali S | Ravindra K |Vijay B| Karan
snippet.description:
“चंद्राची कोर ” या सुरेल आणि भावस्पर्शी प्रेमगीताच्या सुंदर प्रवासात हरवून जा. 🌙✨
निक आणि सृष्टि यांच्या मनमोहक अभिनयासह, हृदयाला स्पर्श करणारे संगीत आणि भावनांनी भरलेली ही प्रेमकथा तुमच्या मनात कायमची घर करून जाईल. 🎶 
आता साईरत्न एंटरटेनमेंट चॅनेलला सबस्क्राइब करा आणि मराठी संगीताचा आनंद घ्या! ❤️👉

Producers: Sandesh Vitthal Gadekar, Suresh Vitthal Gadekar
Featuring: Nick Shinde, Srushti Ambavale
Singer : Ravindra Khomne, Sonali Sonawane
Music Director : Vijay Bhate
Lyrics : Karan Sawant


🎵 AUDIO CREDITS
Song Arranged & Produced By : Rohan Tupe
Guitar : EssJay
Mandoline : EssJay
Song Mixed & Mastered By : Ajinkya Dhapare @ The Sonic Station, Mumbai
Assistant to Ajinkya : Virat Bhushetty
Vocal Dubbing : DAWN Studio, PuneBy : Tushar Pandit
Guitar & Mandoline Recorded At : ALOP StudioBy : Kaushal VG
Chorus : Vijay Bhate & Karan Sawant

🎬 VIDEO CREDITS
Director : Deepak & Manasi
Choreographer : Deepak & Manasi
Directors Team :Ruchita MazireSuresh Kharat
Dancers :Abhishek, Rushikesh, Chaitanya, Vinod,Vishwa,Suresh,Ishita,Geetika,Vedika,VeeraShrutika
BTS Shoot & Edit : Praful Ghatvisave
Executive Producer : Imran Pathan
Line Producer : Shahbaz Sayyed
Production Manager : Prince Singh
Art Direction : Shrikant Pote & Ved Pote
Spot : Ketan and Team
Light Man : Sharma Ji
Makeup : Bhagwat Sonawane
Makeup Assistant : Uddesh Chidrewar
Costume Designer & Stylist : Tejashree Dahibhate
Costume Assistant : Sparshika Tisage
Dressman : Sahil Gajul
Hair : Anuraadha Karsule
Social Media: Azoli 
PR: Amruta Mane
Colour DI: Deva Awhad
Publicity Design: Santosh Yesale( scarlet studios)
VFX: Munna


Lyrics
खुळ्यावाणी बघ झालं 
उरामंदी सण सण.. 
लवतीया गं पापणी. 

सैर भैर आता झालं..
डोस्क्यात दण दण
तुझ्या साठी गं साजणी.

छम छम पैंजण 
वाजती खण खण.. 
सपनात हरतो भान 
मी.. 

टक मक नजर.
करतिया कहर..
तड फड करतो आज मी..

केसा मधी, एक वेणी त्याच्यात  ग्वाड मोगरा..
चंद्राची कोर ही पोरं, लई भारी 
बघुनिया लाग जी घोर,ही पोरं, चंद्रा ची कोर ही पोरं 


बावरला जीव बघ.. 
काळजात धडधड.. 
होतंया जी आज रे.. 

झुंजुमुंजू किरनात.. 
तुझ्या माझ्या पिरमात.. 
होतीया पहाट रे..

चमचम टिपूर.. 
चांदन आतुर.. 
करते इशारा आज जी.. 

भिरभिर वाऱ्यात..
दूरदूर नभात
मन हे उडतंय आज जी..
केसामंधी एक वेणी,
त्याच्यात गोड मोगरा... 
चंद्राची कोर मी पोरं,लय भारी.. 
नखऱ्यानी लावते घोरं, मी पोरं..

टिपूर डोळ्यात तुझ्या बुडले पार ग. 
काळजाच्या काठावरी.. झालय वार ग..

खट्याळ नजरेला अवखळ श्वासाला 
दिसलं तुझंच रूप रे..
नादावल्या मनाला लाजऱ्या जीवाला. 
लागण झाली आज रे 

चोरून बघणं, हळूच हसणं. 
घायाळ करतय मला.. 
तु घायाळ करते मला.

चमचम टिपूर.. 
चांदन आतुर.. 
करते इशारा आज जी.. 

भिरभिर वाऱ्यात..
दूरदूर नभात
मन हे उडतंय आज जी..

केसा मधी, एक वेणी त्याच्यात  ग्वाड मोगरा..
चंद्राची कोर ही पोरं, लई भारी 
बघुनिया लाग जी घोर,ही पोरं, चंद्रा ची कोर ही पोरं




© Sairatna Entertainment

localized.description:
“चंद्राची कोर ” या सुरेल आणि भावस्पर्शी प्रेमगीताच्या सुंदर प्रवासात हरवून जा. 🌙✨
निक आणि सृष्टि यांच्या मनमोहक अभिनयासह, हृदयाला स्पर्श करणारे संगीत आणि भावनांनी भरलेली ही प्रेमकथा तुमच्या मनात कायमची घर करून जाईल. 🎶 
आता साईरत्न एंटरटेनमेंट चॅनेलला सबस्क्राइब करा आणि मराठी संगीताचा आनंद घ्या! ❤️👉

Featuring: Nick Shinde, Srushti Ambavale

snippet.title: Franklin Saves Simeon's BMW Showroom! 😱 | GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
🚨 Simeon's BMW Showroom has been emptied!

An American Boss steals every BMW car from Simeon's showroom and secretly sends them to different locations before sunset. Franklin, Shinchan, and Pinchan decide to bring every single BMW back before it's too late!

The rescue mission takes Franklin through some of his most dangerous adventures ever:

🥊 Fight against the American Boss and his goons
✈️ Jump onto a flying cargo plane to recover a BMW
🚁 Fly to a mountain top and rescue another BMW
🏆 Win a MrBeast challenge to earn the remaining BMW cars
🚗 Return every BMW safely to Simeon's showroom

Will Franklin complete the impossible mission and save Simeon's showroom?

👍 If you enjoyed this GTA 5 Malayalam adventure, don't forget to Like, Share, and Subscribe for more Franklin & Shinchan family videos!

#GTAVMalayalam #Franklin #Shinchan #BMW #MrBeast #GTA5 #MalayalamGaming #TheMalluDon

snippet.title: Avarohanam - Video Song | Athiradi | Tovino Thomas | Basil Joseph | KS Harisankar | Vishnu Vijay
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Malayalam

Presenting the video song "Avarohanam" from 'Athiradi' starring Tovino Thomas, Basil Joseph, Zarin Shihab, Riya Shibu and others. Directed by Arun Anirudhan. Music Composed by Vishnu Vijay

Song Credits: 
Song : Avarohanam
Singers  : KS Harisankar, Vishnu Vijay
Lyrics : Suhail Koya
Music Composed, Arranged and Produced by Vishnu Vijay @ DRAVIDA STUDIOS, CHENNAI
Veena : Haritha Raj
Trumpet & Trombone (Solo) : Viji Manuel
Additional Music Producers : Bharath Madhusudhanan, Christy Thomas Cherian, Ramesh Vasudev
Artist Liaison & Distribution Manager : Poornima Kannan
Music Production Manager : Christy Thomas Cherian
Studio Sessions Manager : Paul Renold
Artist Session Manager : K D Vincent
Mixed & Mastered : Sujith Sreedhar@The Masterhouse,2bq studios,Chennai. 
Assisted by Amal Mithu
Sessions manager:Vignesh Raj

STUDIOS :
1. Vishnu Vijay’s vocal recorded @ DRAVIDA STUDIOS, CHENNAI
2. KS Harisankar’s vocal, Haritha Raj’s Veena and Viji Manuel’s Trumpet and Trombone recorded @ 2bq studios, Chennai
3. Rottenbiller UTCA - Budapest Scoring Orchestra Performed and Recorded @ Rottenbiller Hall
Recording Engineer : Viktor Szabo

BUDAPEST SCORING ORCHESTRA
Conductor: Peter Illeyni 
Orchestral Arrangements: Beven Elankumaran 
Orchestra Indian Representative - Balasubramanian G
Session Producer - Bálint Sapszon
Librarian- Anna Sapszo, Kati Reti
Orchestrators:
Beven Elankumaran 
Sanjay RA
Balasubramanian G

First violins: Hutás Gergely, Stankowsky Eszter, Foskolos Péter, Kuklis Gergely, Veér Bertalan ,Fehér Anna ,Rigó Tamás ,Sárosi Péter, Dulay Krisztina, Bernáth Orsolya, Morzsa Róbert, Nagy Eszter

Second violins: Horváth Róbert, Homoki Gábor, Dráfi Kálmán, Németh Nóra, Ilosfai Dorka,Bíró Tamás, Dózsa Lajos Péter, Dancsó Diána, Kanyurszky Péter, Draskóczy Ágnes

Violas: Porzsolt György, Csonka Emil, Gulyás Nagy György, Lezsák Attila, Mohácsi Gyula, Rácz László, Sztojka Zoltán, Hargitai Bence

Cellos: Ölveti Mátyás, Balázs István, Kurucz Krisztián, Mády-Szabó Eszter, Rádli Ramóna, Simon Sejla

Contrabass (4)
Bíró Zoltán, H.Zováthi Alajos, Mohácsi Norbert


Movie Credits: 
Directed By: Arun Anirudhan
Produced By: Dr. Ananthu S  &  Basil Joseph
Co-producers: Sameer Thahir, Tovino Thomas
Written By: Paulson Skaria, Arun Anirudhan
DOP: Samuel Henry
Editor: Chaman Chakko
Music Composer : Vishnu Vijay
Lyrics: Suhail Koya
Production Designer: Maanav Suresh
Costume Designer: Mashar Hamsa
Make Up: Ronex Xavier
Stunts: Action Sandhosh & Phoenix Prabu
Sound Designer: Nixon George
Production Controller: Antony Thomas
Art Director: Akhil Damodhar
Executive Producers: Nikhil Ramanath & Amal Xavier Manackatharayil
Sound Mix: Rajakrishnan MR
DI Colorist: Joyner Thomas
Additional Dialogues: Sonu Surendran
Finance Controller: Midhun K Varghese
VFX: Mindstein Studios
Chief Associate Directors: Suku Damodar, Sohil
Stills: Rohith K Suresh
Title Design: Sarcasanam
PRO: Vaisakh C Vadakkeveedu & Jinu Anilkumar
Publicity Designs: Yellowtooths
Digital Content: Dripwave Collective
Lyric Video: Dripwave Collective X Laetitia Studios (Kishor Viswa)

Lyrics: 
Sa Ri Ga Ma Pa Dha Ni Sa Sa.. Sa..
Dha Ni Sa Ri Sa Sa Ri Sa Sa Ri Sa Ni Dha Pa Ma Pa
Dha Ni Sa Ri Dha Pa Sa Ni Dha Pa Ma Ga Ri Sa..
Sa Ri Ga Ma Pa Dha Ni Sa Sa.. Sa..
 
Nee
Kodupathi Kodukopi
Koduvairikku Kodupaapi
Kodum Kaalikku, Kodiyaali
Vaari-Naadhaa-Sharam !

Nee
Kodumkaattadi Kodumaari
Karaalika-Karinkaali
Kalikaaraka- Kodumaari
Vaari-Naadhaa-Sharam !

Sa.. Sarppashira Sarvadamana
Ri.. Riputha Rundhika Rudrika
Ga.. Gamana Gambheera Garuda
Ma.. Mahaapralaya Kirathaashi

Thaapasaa
Maanusaa
Raakshasaa
Raavanaa

Karna Kalki Kaamane
Kamsa Keejamaachane
Ekalavya\Lokane
Ashtalohashakthane

Panchakalppapaala-Manthrajaalavelathanthra-Rudraveerane
Kaama-Krodha-Moha-Lobha-Maadi
Ekaveerya-Lankadeshadaasa-Devasooraarakthaa
Pralayaarambhame..

snippet.title: Laare - Maninder Buttar | 8K Ultra HD Video | Punjabi Love Song ft. Sargun Mehta & Maninder Buttar
snippet.description:
Experience the magic of Laare in stunning 8K Ultra HD quality! ❤️ Featuring the charming chemistry of Maninder Buttar and Sargun Mehta, this beloved Punjabi romantic song continues to win hearts with its soulful lyrics, beautiful melody, and emotional storytelling.

Watch every frame come alive in breathtaking 8K resolution and relive one of the most popular Punjabi love songs of recent years.

🎵 Song: Laare
🎤 Singer & Lyricist: Maninder Buttar
🎭 Featuring: Sargun Mehta

Lyrics of Punjabi

ਮੈਂ ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਛਡ ਦਿੱਤਾ ਤੇਰੇ ਕਰਕੇ
ਤੇਰੇ ਉੱਤੋਂ ਸਬ ਕੁਝ ਵਾਰੀ ਬੈਠੀ ਆਂ
ਤੈਨੂੰ ਪਤਾ ਤਾਂ ਹੈ ਪਰ ਫਿਕਰ ਨਹੀ
ਤੇਰੇ ਲਈ ਮੈਂ ਯਾਰਾ ਵੇ ਕਵਾਰੀ ਬੈਠੀ ਆਂ
ਯਾਰੀ ਤੇਰੇ ਵੇ ਯਾਰੀ
ਜਿਸ੍ਮਾਂ ਤੱਕ ਹੈ ਸਾਰੀ ਦੀ ਸਾਰੀ ਯਾਰੀ
ਯਾਰੀ ਤੇਰੇ ਵੇ ਯਾਰੀ
ਜਿਸ੍ਮਾਂ ਤੱਕ ਹੈ ਸਾਰੀ ਦੀ ਸਾਰੀ
ਵੇ ਧੋਖਾ ਹੋਣਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਨਾਲ
ਮੈਨੂੰ ਪਤਾ ਬਸ ਲਾਰੇ ਆ
ਵੇ ਤੂੰ ਵਿਆਹ ਨੀ ਕਰੌਣਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਨਾਲ
ਮੈਨੂੰ ਪਤਾ ਬਸ ਲਾਰੇ ਆ
ਵੇ ਤੂੰ ਵਿਆਹ ਨੀ ਕਰੌਣਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਨਾਲ
ਅੱਖਿਆਂ ਚ ਸੂਰਮਾ ਮੈਂ ਪੌਣਾ ਛਡਤਾ
ਜਗਦੇ ਹੀ ਰਹੀਏ ਹਾਏ ਸੌਣਾ ਛਡਤਾ
ਅੱਖਿਆਂ ਚ ਸੂਰਮਾ ਮੈਂ ਪੌਣਾ ਛਡਤਾ
ਜਗਦੇ ਹੀ ਰਹੀਏ ਹਾਏ ਸੌਣਾ ਛਡਤਾ
ਤੇਰੇ ਪਿਛਹੇ ਛਡਤੇ ਮੈਂ ਘਰ ਦੇ ਮੇਰੇ
ਤੇਰੇ ਪਿਛਹੇ ਹਸਨਾ ਹਸੌਆ ਛਡਤਾ
ਕਿਓ ਰੌਲੇ ਪੌਣਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਨਾਲ
ਮੈਨੂੰ ਪਤਾ ਬਸ ਲਾਰੇ ਆ
ਵੇ ਤੂੰ ਵਿਆਹ ਨੀ ਕਰੌਣਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਨਾਲ
ਮੈਨੂੰ ਪਤਾ ਬਸ ਲਾਰੇ ਆ
ਵੇ ਤੂੰ ਵਿਆਹ ਨੀ ਕਰੌਣਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਨਾਲ
ਨਾ ਕਿਸੇ ਜੋਗਾ ਛਡੇ ਐਤਬਾਰ ਨਾ ਕਰਿਓ
ਕਦੇ ਕਿਸੀ ਸ਼ਾਯਰ ਨੂੰ ਪਿਆਰ ਨਾ ਕਰਿਓ
ਸ਼ਾਯਾਰੀ ਵਾਯਰੀ ਸੁਣ ਦਿਲਦਾਰ ਨਾ ਕਰਿਓ
ਕਿਸੇ ਜੋਗਾ ਛਡੇ ਐਤਬਾਰ ਨਾ ਕਰਿਓ
ਜਾਣੀ ਨਾਲ ਲਾਇਆ ਤੇ ਪਤਾ ਲੱਗਿਆ
ਕਦੇ ਕਿਸੇ ਸ਼ਾਯਰ ਨਾਲ ਪਿਆਰ ਨਾ ਕਰਿਓ
ਹੋ ਮੇਰਾ ਹੋਆ ਬੁਰਾ ਹਾਲ
ਮੈਨੂੰ ਪਤਾ ਬਸ ਲਾਰੇ ਆ
ਵੇ ਤੂੰ ਵਿਆਹ ਨੀ ਕਰੌਣਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਨਾਲ
ਮੈਨੂੰ ਪਤਾ ਬਸ ਲਾਰੇ ਆ
ਵੇ ਤੂੰ ਵਿਆਹ ਨੀ ਕਰੌਣਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਨਾਲ


Lyrics of Laare

Main sab kujh chhad ditta tere karke
Tere utton sab kujh vaari baithi aan
Tainu pata taa hai par fikar nahi
Tere layi main yaara ve kawari baithi aan

Yaari tere ve yaari
Jismaan tak hai saari di saari yaari
Yaari tere ve yaari
Jismaan tak hai saari di saari

Ve dhakka hona mere naal
Mainu pata bas laare aa
Ve tu viah ni karauna mere naal
Mainu pata bas laare aa
Ve tu viah ni karauna mere naal
Mainu pata bas laare aa
Ve tu viah ni karauna mere naal

Yaari tere ve yaari
Jisman tak hai saari di saari yaari
Yaari tere ve yaari
Jisman tak hai saari di saari

Akhiyan'ch surma main pauna chhaddta
Jagde hi rahiye haye sona chhadta
Akhiyan'ch surma main pauna chhaddta
Jagde hi rahiye haye sona chhadta

Tere pichhe hasna hasauna chhadta

Mainu pata bas laare aa
Ve tu viah ni karauna mere naal

Na kise joga chhade aitbaar na kareyo
Kade kisi shaayar nu pyaar na kareyo
Shayari vayari sunn vaar na kariyo
Kise joga chhade aitbaar na kariyo
